creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mitch from comment #37)

To see what's causing the program interrupt you'd need to examine the kernel at crash time.  Though, it's possible there's a compile issue that's generating code for newer powerpc64.  Just check objdump on your kernel, for 0xa5081a8 address, and see what's at that address.
